name: Clam Chowder- New England Home Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon and drain it on paper towels, reserving the drippings.
2. Sauté the onion in the reserved drippings until tender.
3. Set aside the sautéed onion.
4. Combine the potato, water, salt, and pepper in a pot. Cook until the potato is tender.
5. Stir in the minced clams, milk, and butter. Heat thoroughly.
6. Sprinkle crumbled bacon over each serving.
